Container.Name: Sentinel-Collector
Container.Overview:
Sentinel's Plex event collector. Connects to your Plex Media Server via WebSocket and captures all playback events in real time, writing them to the Sentinel-DB container.
Requires Sentinel-DB to be installed and running first. Install Sentinel-API alongside this for the admin UI and REST API.
Part of the LFFPicard homelab ecosystem: https://github.com/LFFPicard
Container.Requires: Requires Sentinel-DB to be running first.

Config.Name: Import Path
Config.Description: Drop your tautulli.db here to migrate your Tautulli history

Config.Name: Logs Path
Config.Description: Collector log files (rolling, 10MB max, last 3 kept)

Config.Name: Database URL
Config.Description: postgres://sentinel:YOUR_DB_PASSWORD@sentinel-db:5432/sentinel — replace YOUR_DB_PASSWORD with the password set in Sentinel-DB, and sentinel-db with that container's actual name or IP

Config.Name: Plex URL
Config.Description: Full URL to your Plex server e.g. http://192.168.1.x:32400

Config.Name: Plex Token
Config.Description: Your Plex authentication token. Find it at: Plex Web → Settings → Troubleshooting → Get an X-Plex-Token
